word: H5059 - נָגַן - nâgan - naw-gan' - Player on instruments

sections.paragraph:
Original: נגן

Transliteration: nâgan

Phonetic: naw-gan'

BDB Definition:

  1. to play or strike strings, play a stringed instrument
    1. (Qal)
      1. player (participle)
    2. (Piel)
      1. to play
        1. player, minstrel (participle)

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1292.1

Part(s) of speech: Verb
